title: Attraction
writer: Tinto Brass, Gian Carlo Fusco, Francesco Longo
actors: Anita Sanders, Terry Carter, Nino Segurini
plot: Married woman explores psychedelic English youth scene, engages in interracial affair with African-American man. Anti-Vietnam sentiments, violence, and sex depicted. Soundtrack by Freedom, offshoot of Procol Harum.
